answer:
\boxed{D}

The quest **"Ring-a-Ding Ding"** is not named after a real-life song—it’s a fictional title referencing the casino’s "Ring-a-Ding Ding" slot machine. The other options (**A**, **B**, and **C**) are all real songs: *"Come Fly with Me"* (Frank Sinatra), *"Ain't That a Kick in the Head"* (The Dave Clark Five), and *"They Went That-A-Way"* (The Coasters).
